title: ParCoolSkill
description: A mod that expands ParCool actions into combat skills.
body:
# ParCoolSkill

Extend your motion — fight with style.

**ParCoolSkill** is an addon for [ParCool](https://modrinth.com/mod/parcool) that expands combat
with high-impact skills inspired by **Slay the Spire**.

Chain **CatLeap**, **Dodge**, **ChargeJump**, **Flipping**, and **Slide**
into powerful attacks, rewarding precise movement, timing, and positioning.

This mod also features a fully configurable system,
allowing its skills to be easily adjusted for balance and gameplay preferences.

All skill details are now integrated into the in-game **ParCool Guide**, allowing players to view skill triggers, effects, and related mechanics at any time.

This mod is recommended to be used together with [Spartan Weaponry Unofficial](https://modrinth.com/mod/spartan-weaponry-unofficial) to provide a wider variety of weapon choices and a gameplay experience that better fits this mod's combat mechanics.

---

## Core Mechanics

### Bullet Time
**Bullet Time** slows down all entities and the entire game world **except the player**.

### Minor Bullet Time
**Minor Bullet Time** functions like Bullet Time,
but additionally slows down the player’s physical movement.

### Status Effects

- **Vulnerable**: Increases physical and magic damage taken by **50%**.
- **Neutralized**: Reduces physical and magic damage caused by **25%**.

Also added **Vulnerable** and **Neutralized** potions.

- **Vulnerable Potion** can be brewed using a Weakness Potion and a Wither Rose.
- **Neutralized Potion** can be brewed using a Weakness Potion and a Cobweb.

---

## Implemented Skills

### Wild Strike
After performing a **CatLeap**, your next attack triggers **Wild Strike**,
dealing **double damage** and granting **0.5 second of parry time**.

---

### Sneaky Strike
After successfully dodging an attack using **Dodge**,
if your current stamina is above the threshold,
your next attack within **1 second** triggers **Sneaky Strike**,
dealing **double damage**.

If the attack hits the target from behind, it instead triggers **Backstab**,
dealing **triple damage**.

---

### Dropkick
Perform a **Slide** during a **CatLeap** to execute a **Dropkick**.

- Damage is calculated as:
  **base damage** *(configurable, default: 4)*  
  + **additional attack damage** *(affected by Strength, default: 1)*  
  + **lower-body armor value** *(combined armor value of leggings and boots)*  
  + **bonus maximum health** *(the amount by which current maximum health exceeds the default value)*
- Grants temporary **invulnerability**
- Knocks back the target

If the target is affected by **Vulnerable**:
- Refunds the skill stamina cost
- Triggers **Bullet Time** for **3 seconds**

---

### Heel Hook
Perform a **Slide** during a **Dodge** to execute a **Heel Hook**.

- Damage is calculated as:
  **base damage** *(configurable, default: 4)*  
  + **additional attack damage** *(affected by Strength, default: 1)*  
  + **lower-body armor value** *(combined armor value of leggings and boots)*  
  + **bonus maximum health** *(the amount by which current maximum health exceeds the default value)*
- Grants temporary **invulnerability**
- Applies **Slowness** to the target

If the target is affected by **Neutralized**:
- Refunds the skill stamina cost
- Triggers **Bullet Time** for **3 seconds**

---

### Bash
After a **ChargeJump**,
your next downward strike triggers **Bash**,
applying **Vulnerable** to the target.

---

### Backflip
Perform a backward **Flipping** while sneaking to trigger **Backflip**.

- Grants temporary **invulnerability**
- Triggers **Minor Bullet Time**
- Activates a ranged weapon rapid-fire effect

During this state:
- Ranged weapon charge speed is **doubled**
- Fully charged shots are **automatically released**

---

### Cleave
While holding a weapon capable of sweeping attacks,
perform an attack after charging for at least **50%**
to trigger **Cleave**.

For **0.5 seconds**:
- Entity interaction range is added by **50%**
- Gains additional damage multiplier equal to your **sweeping damage ratio**
- Enemies swept by the crosshair are automatically struck with full-strength attacks
- By default, only **one enemy per direction** can be hit
- Each level of **Sweeping Edge** grants **one additional penetration**
- Each enemy can be hit **at most once per activation**

---

### Flick Flack
While **targeting an enemy during a Dodge**, perform a **Flipping**
to trigger **Flick Flack**.

- Leaps high into the air and gains temporary **invulnerability**
- Your **next attack** deals damage to multiple enemies
- Applies **Neutralized** to affected targets
- Gains **0.5 second of parry time**

---

## Design Philosophy

ParCoolSkill emphasizes **momentum-based combat**:
movement is not just positioning, but a core damage mechanic.
Mastery comes from chaining mobility skills, exploiting status synergies,
and controlling the flow of time itself.

---

## Requirements

Dependency: [ParCool](https://modrinth.com/mod/parcool), [TimeScaleLib](https://modrinth.com/mod/timescalelib)

Requires the installation of **TimeScaleLib** as an additional dependency library to provide time-scaling functionality.

This mod is intended to work alongside [AliveCombat](https://modrinth.com/mod/alive-combat) and [ReHurtTime](https://modrinth.com/mod/rehurttime) for an enhanced and more enjoyable combat experience.
